arts.ttl: Liam Delap wanted 'by half the Premier League': Ipswich star's best transfer options as Man Utd and Chelsea circle
arts.sum: Somewhat surprisingly, there is not a Premier League club that SciSports awards five stars to for playing time for Delap. There’s no question that Manchester United are Delap’s best option when it comes to both playing style and formation.

arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Legia Warsaw – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea face Legia Warsaw in Poland tonight in the first leg of their Europa Conference League quarter-final. Enzo Maresca has his sights on silverware in his debut campaign, with the Blues strong favourites to lift the trophy next month. Chelsea have recorded eight consecutive European wins to reach this stage with ease. arts.ttl: Legia Warsaw vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea travel to the Polish capital to battle it out with Legia Warsaw for a place in the semi-finals of the Europa Conference League. The Blues are the favourites to lift the trophy in Poland at the end of May. In the previous round, Enzo Maresca and his players eased past FC Copenhagen. arts.ttl: Frank Lampard goes crazy as Chelsea legend wins late again with Coventry City, former manager left 'jealous'
Chelsea handed Jamie Gittens transfer green light as 'movement' made for Borussia Dortmund star
arts.sum: Chelsea have received an update on Borussia Dortmund star Jamie Gittens amid reports of a potential return to Stamford Bridge. football.london reported in January that Gittens and Alejandro Garnacho of Manchester United have been identified as players of interest to Chelsea in their search for a new left-winger .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca confirms ‘good news’ on two injured Chelsea players, 'very soon'
arts.sum: Chelsea head coach Enzo Maresca has just provided a positive update on the fitness of two first-team players ahead of the match against Legia Warsaw....

arts.ttl: Chelsea can move one step closer to sealing bargain Liam Delap transfer this weekend
arts.sum: The sooner Ipswich are relegated, the sooner Chelsea will know for definite that Delap's release clause will stand at £30m, even if it looks likely that the Tractor Boys will finish inside the bottom three. When Delap signed his five-year contract at Ipswich last summer, there was a clause inserted that he could leave for £10m less if the club didn't stay in the Premier League.
